content.hint: 询问下一步该做什么，常用表达是 'What's the next step' 或 'What do I need to do now?'

options: Can I get it right now
Is it possible to skip this

content.situation: 你在银行丢失了银行卡，工作人员告诉你需要申请补发，你希望了解接下来的流程和所需材料。
content.speakerText: We can issue you a new card, but you'll need to submit a signed form and a copy of your ID.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们可以为你补发一张新卡，但你需要提交一份签字的表格和身份证复印件。
content.responseTemplate: ___, and do I need to bring anything else?

content.hint: 确认是否必须完成某项动作，常用表达是 'Do I have to...' 或 'Is it required to...'

blanks.answer: Do I have to make an appointment
options: Do I have to make an appointment
Can someone else book for me

content.situation: 你去政府服务中心办理居住证续签，工作人员说需要预约，你希望确认是否必须预约以及办理时间范围。
content.speakerText: You need to book an appointment online before coming in.
content.speakerTextCn: 你来之前需要在线预约。
content.knowledgePoint: 确认是否需要特定条件
content.responseTemplate: ___, and what time do they accept visitors?

content.hint: 询问是否需要再次亲自到场，常用表达是 'Do I need to come back?' 或 'Should I return?'

blanks.answer: Do I need to come back
options: Do I need to come back
Is it possible to pay extra
Will you send it by email

content.situation: 你在学校办公室补办学生证，工作人员说要等一周才能拿到，你希望确认是否需要再次回来领取。
content.speakerText: Your new student card will be ready in a week.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的新学生证一周后准备好。
content.knowledgePoint: 确认是否需要后续行动
content.responseTemplate: ___, or will it be mailed to me?

content.hint: 补办手续中，正式文件通常用这个动词
content.template: What documents do I need to ___?

content.scenarioHint: 你刚刚被告知需要补办某项证件，但不确定还需要准备哪些材料或文件。
content.speakerText: You'll need to bring some documents to complete the process.
content.speakerTextCn: 你需要带一些文件来完成这个流程。
content.responseTemplate: Could you please tell me what ___ I need to bring?
content.hint: 这里需要询问的是具体需要带什么材料，常用词是 documents。
content.knowledgePoint: 询问所需材料的标准化表达

content.scenarioHint: 你已得知下一步要前往某个机构办理业务，但想确认是否需要提前预约或是否有特定流程。
content.speakerText: You need to go to the service center to submit your application.
content.speakerTextCn: 你需要去服务中心提交申请。
content.responseTemplate: Do I need to ___ before going there?
content.hint: 在办理官方事务前，询问是否需要预约的常用表达是 'make an appointment'。
content.knowledgePoint: 询问是否需要预约的地道表达
